name: Filestash
tagline: Filestash is a modern web client for SFTP, S3, FTP, WebDAV, Git, Minio, LDAP, CalDAV, CardDAV, Mysql, Backblaze...
description:
Filestash is a modern web client for SFTP, S3, FTP, WebDAV, Git, Minio, LDAP, CalDAV, CardDAV, Mysql, Backblaze...


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  filestash:
    image: machines/filestash:b7b45f2
    volumes:
      - filestash-app-data-state:/app/data/state
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42032:8334
volumes:
  filestash-app-data-state: null
